heading: Definitions
label: 37a Definitions
notes: Amendments1997—Pars. (1), (2). –(C), added par. (2), redesignated former par. (2) as (1), and struck out heading and text of former par. (1). Text read as follows: “The term ‘annuity rate’ means the percentage of the fair market value of a gift (determined as of the date of the gift) given in exchange for a charitable gift annuity, that represents the amount of the annual payment to be made to 1 or 2 annuitants over the life of either or both under the terms of the agreement to give such gift in exchange for such annuity.”Pub. L. 105–26, § 2(2)(A)Pars. (4) to (6). , (E), added par. (4) and redesignated former pars. (4) and (5) as (5) and (6), respectively.Pub. L. 105–26, § 2(2)(D)

children.heading: Antitrust laws
children.label: 1 Antitrust laws
children.text: The term “antitrust laws” has the meaning given it in subsection (a) of , except that such term includes to the extent that such section 45 applies to unfair methods of competition.section 12 of this titlesection 45 of this title

children.heading: Charitable remainder trust
children.label: 2 Charitable remainder trust
children.text: The term “charitable remainder trust” has the meaning given it in .section 664(d) of title 26

children.heading: Charitable gift annuity
children.label: 3 Charitable gift annuity
children.text: The term “charitable gift annuity” has the meaning given it in .section 501(m)(5) of title 26

children.heading: Final determination
children.label: 4 Final determination
children.text: The term “final determination” includes an Internal Revenue Service determination, after exhaustion of donor’s and donee’s administrative remedies, disallowing the donor’s charitable deduction for the year in which the initial contribution was made because of the donee’s failure to comply at such time with the requirements of section 501(m)(5) or 664(d), respectively, of title 26.

children.heading: Person
children.label: 5 Person
children.text: The term “person” has the meaning given it in subsection (a) of .section 12 of this title

children.heading: State
children.label: 6 State
children.text: The term “State” has the meaning given it in .section 15g(2) of this title
